changeSet.author: mercotrace
changeSet.comment: Backfill links when portal contacts were already used in arrivals or auctions.
changeSet.sql:
INSERT INTO trader_portal_contact_link (id, trader_id, contact_id, linked_at) SELECT nextval('sequence_generator'), v.trader_id, siv.contact_id, NOW() FROM seller_in_vehicle siv JOIN vehicle v ON v.id = siv.vehicle_id JOIN contact c ON c.id = siv.contact_id WHERE siv.contact_id IS NOT NULL AND c.trader_id IS NULL AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM trader_portal_contact_link t WHERE t.trader_id = v.trader_id AND t.contact_id = siv.contact_id );
INSERT INTO trader_portal_contact_link (id, trader_id, contact_id, linked_at) SELECT nextval('sequence_generator'), v.trader_id, ae.buyer_id, NOW() FROM auction_entry ae JOIN auction a ON a.id = ae.auction_id JOIN lot l ON l.id = a.lot_id JOIN seller_in_vehicle siv ON siv.id = l.seller_vehicle_id JOIN vehicle v ON v.id = siv.vehicle_id JOIN contact c ON c.id = ae.buyer_id WHERE ae.buyer_id IS NOT NULL AND c.trader_id IS NULL AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM trader_portal_contact_link t WHERE t.trader_id = v.trader_id AND t.contact_id = ae.buyer_id );
